heading: Publication of recommendations
label: 361 Publication of recommendations
text: The recommendations of the President which take effect shall be printed in the Statutes at Large in the same volume as public laws and shall be printed in the Federal Register and included in the Code of Federal Regulations.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Dec. 16, 1967section 220(a)(1) of Pub. L. 90–206section 3110 of Title 5
